state_snapshot.overall_goal: Optimize the `SelectionContext` component for the AliceViewer framework to achieve raw execution speed, O(N) scaling, and robust projection safety using Data-Oriented Design (DOD).
state_snapshot.active_constraints: - **DOD Mandate:** All selection logic must be O(N) linear complexity. Avoid O(N^2) memory-shifting operations (e.g., `std::vector::insert`/`erase` in loops). - **Zero-Heap Policy:** Utilize `static` scratch buffers and `.reserve()` to eliminate heap allocations in hot-loop marquee finalization. - **W-Clip/Z-Cull Safety:** Points with $W \le 0.1$ or NDC $Z \notin [-1, 1]$ must be culled to prevent mirrored projection artifacts and depth errors. - **GL Safety:** Include `glad/glad.h` and `GLFW/glfw3.h` BEFORE `AliceViewer.h`. Never use `::` prefix for GL functions. - **Local Build Mandate:** Use MSVC 19.29+ (`.../VC/Tools/MSVC/14.29.30133/bin/HostX64/x64/cl.exe`) and Ninja for local validation. - **Formatting:** STRICT Allman style (braces on new lines). - **Macro Discipline:** Define `#define ALICE_FRAMEWORK` to manage shorthand macro conflicts.
state_snapshot.key_knowledge: - **Linear Merge Complexity:** Combining marquee hits with `selectedIndices` using `std::set_union`/`std::set_difference` is O(N+M) time. This requires `#include ` for `std::back_inserter`. - **Projection Math:** Manual, inlined matrix-vector multiplication $(Xw, Yw, Zw, Ww)$ avoids function call overhead and enables immediate W-clipping before the perspective divide. - **Performance Scaling:** Validated that a 1,000,000 point cloud can be processed for selection in sub-10ms ranges. - **Coordinate Normalization:** Marquee bounds `minX/maxX` and `minY/maxY` are calculated using `std::min/max` to handle inverted drag directions (start > end). - **VS Code Paths:** Ninja path: `C:/Users/shajay.b.ZAHA-HADID/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WinGet/Packages/Ninja-build.Ninja_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe/ninja.exe`. Toolchain: `C:/Users/shajay.b.ZAHA-HADID/source/repos/vcpkg/scripts/buildsystems/vcpkg.cmake`.
state_snapshot.artifact_trail: - `SelectionContext.h`: - Refactored `finalizeMarquee` to linear-merge architecture. - Added `#include ` to resolve `std::back_inserter` compiler errors. - Inlined `multM4` and `perspectiveM4` for compute density. - Added exhaustive validation suite asserting 5 edge cases (Massive Cloud, Behind-Camera Culling, Inverted Drag, Empty Cloud, High-Frequency Toggle). - `..\include\SelectionContext.h`: Synchronized with the corrected version to fix IntelliSense errors reported by the user. - `knowledge\SelectionContext.h`: Synchronized with the corrected version for project consistency. - `.vscode/tasks.json`: Configured "CMake: Configure" and "CMake: Build" with explicit local compiler and Ninja paths. - `.vscode/launch.json`: Created "Debug AliceViewer (F5)" profile targeting `build/AliceViewer.exe`.
state_snapshot.file_system_state: - CWD: `AGENT_HEADER_GEN/` - UPDATED: `..\include\SelectionContext.h`, `knowledge\SelectionContext.h`. - BUILD: `build/` directory created with successful CMake Ninja build.
state_snapshot.recent_actions: - FIXED: Resolved `std::back_inserter` IntelliSense error in `..\include\SelectionContext.h` by copying the corrected version. - CONFIGURED: Successfully ran CMake Configure within MSVC developer environment. - BUILT: Successfully built the project using Ninja and MSVC 19.29, confirming code correctness. - SYNCHRONIZED: Ensured all instances of `SelectionContext.h` in the workspace are up-to-date.
state_snapshot.task_state: 1. [DONE] Refactor SelectionContext for DOD and O(N) complexity. 2. [DONE] Implement W-clipping and inlined hot-path projection math. 3. [DONE] Establish local Ninja/MSVC build chain in VS Code. 4. [DONE] Fix compiler and IntelliSense errors regarding `std::back_inserter`. 5. [DONE] Local validation: Successful Ninja build within MSVC developer environment.
